prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small purple metal cylinder
  - obj_1: small brown rubber cube
  - obj_2: large green rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_4: large blue metal cube
  - obj_5: large gray rubber cube
  - obj_6: small green metal cube
  - obj_7: small cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_8: small purple rubber cylinder
  - obj_9: small brown rubber cube

Questions:
[qrr_0081] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0082] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0083] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0084] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0085] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0086] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0087] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0088] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0089] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0090] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0091] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0092] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0093] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0094] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0095] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0096] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0097] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0098] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0099] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0100] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D scene and compare distances between pairs of objects. Let me first estimate the positions of each object based on the image.

From the image, I can estimate approximate 3D positions:
- obj_0 (small purple metal cylinder): right side, middle area
- obj_1 (small brown rubber cube): left-back area
- obj_2 (large green rubber cylinder): front-center
- obj_3 (small yellow metal cylinder): back area
- obj_4 (large blue metal cube): center-back area
- obj_5 (large gray rubber cube): right side
- obj_6 (small green metal cube): far left
- obj_7 (small cyan rubber cylinder): front-left area
- obj_8 (small purple rubber cylinder): back-right area
- obj_9 (small brown rubber cube): right-center area

Let me estimate coordinates (x, y, z) roughly:
- obj_0 (purple metal cyl): (6, 0, 2)
- obj_1 (brown cube left): (2, 0, 4)
- obj_2 (green cyl): (3, 0, -2)
- obj_3 (yellow cyl): (3, 0, 6)
- obj_4 (blue cube): (4, 0, 4)
- obj_5 (gray cube): (7, 0, 2)
- obj_6 (green cube): (0, 0, 2)
- obj_7 (cyan cyl): (2, 0, 0)
- obj_8 (purple rubber cyl): (4, 0, 5)
- obj_9 (brown cube right): (6, 0, 4)

Distance obj_0 to obj_4: sqrt((6-4)²+(2-4)²) = sqrt(4+4) ≈ 2.8

Now calculating each comparison:

qrr_0081: obj_0-obj_4 ≈ 2.8 vs obj_1-obj_3: sqrt((2-3)²+(4-6)²)=sqrt(1+4)≈2.2 → >
qrr_0082: 2.8 vs obj_1-obj_5: sqrt((2-7)²+(4-2)²)=sqrt(25+4)≈5.4 → <
qrr_0083: 2.8 vs obj_1-obj_6: sqrt((2-0)²+(4-2)²)=sqrt(4+4)≈2.8 → ~=
qrr_0084: 2.8 vs obj_1-obj_7: sqrt((2-2)²+(4-0)²)=4 → <
qrr_0085: 2.8 vs obj_1-obj_8: sqrt((2-4)²+(4-5)²)=sqrt(4+1)≈2.2 → >
qrr_0086: 2.8 vs obj_2-obj_3: sqrt((3-3)²+(-2-6)²)=8 → <
qrr_0087: 2.8 vs obj_2-obj_5: sqrt((3-7)²+(-2-2)²)=sqrt(16+16)≈5.7 → <
qrr_0088: 2.8 vs obj_2-obj_6: sqrt((3-0)²+(-2-2)²)=sqrt(9+16)=5 → <
qrr_0089: 2.8 vs obj_2-obj_7: sqrt((3-2)²+(-2-0)²)=sqrt(1+4)≈2.2 → >
qrr_0090: 2.8 vs obj_2-obj_8: sqrt((3-4)²+(-2-5)²)=sqrt(1+49)≈7.1 → <
qrr_0091: 2.8 vs obj_2-obj_9: sqrt((3-6)²+(-2-4)²)=sqrt(9+36)≈6.7 → <
qrr_0092: 2.8 vs obj_3-obj_5: sqrt((3-7)²+(6-2)²)=sqrt(16+16)≈5.7 → <
qrr_0093: 2.8 vs obj_3-obj_6: sqrt((3-0)²+(6-2)²)=sqrt(9+16)=5 → <
qrr_0094: 2.8 vs obj_3-obj_7: sqrt((3-2)²+(6-0)²)=sqrt(1+36)≈6.1 → <
qrr_0095: 2.8 vs obj_3-obj_8: sqrt((3-4)²+(6-5)²)=sqrt(1+1)≈1.4 → >
qrr_0096: 2.8 vs obj_3-obj_9: sqrt((3-6)²+(6-4)²)=sqrt(9+4)≈3.6 → <
qrr_0097: 2.8 vs obj_5-obj_6: sqrt((7-0)²+(2-2)²)=7 → <
qrr_0098: 2.8 vs obj_5-obj_7: sqrt((7-2)²+(2-0)²)=sqrt(25+4)≈5.4 → <
qrr_0099: 2.8 vs obj_5-obj_9: sqrt((7-6)²+(2-4)²)=sqrt(1+4)≈2.2 → >
qrr_0100: 2.8 vs obj_6-obj_7: sqrt((0-2)²+(2-0)²)=sqrt(4+4)≈2.8 → ~=
